mission.title: nats: Add support to leafnode config reload
mission.description: Add support to leafnode config reload. Community-requested feature.

steps.title: Check current nats deployment
steps.description:
Verify your nats version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n nats -l app.kubernetes.io/name=nats
helm list -n nats 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working nats installation.

steps.title: Review nats configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant nats configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n nats -l app.kubernetes.io/name=nats
kubectl get configmap -n nats -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=nats
```
## Feature Request

It would be useful to enable config reload for a few fields of a leafnode config, like the remotes which are not possible to prune right now:

```
[32903] 2021/02/17 1943.113029 [ERR] Failed to reload server configuration: config

steps.title: Apply the fix for Add support to leafnode config reload
steps.description:
Could you share your config before/after? I am not able to reproduce. Going from 0 remote to 1, I get this:
```
[35849] 2021/09/08 1744.457855 [ERR] Failed to reload server configuration: config reload not supported for LeafNode: old={0.0.0.0 5223    [] 2 <nil> 2 false map[]  false 1s [] <nil> 0 0
```yaml
[32903] 2021/02/17 19:55:43.113029 [ERR] Failed to reload server configuration: config reload not supported for LeafNode: old={ 0    [] 0 <nil> 0 false  false 1s [0xc0000d02d0] <nil> 0 0}, new={ 0    [] 0 <nil> 0 false  false 1s [0xc00028e090] <nil> 0 0}
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n nats -l app.kubernetes.io/name=nats
kubectl get events -n nats --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "Add support to leafnode config reload" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary: Could you share your config before/after? I am not able to reproduce.

[35849] 2021/09/08 17:34:44.457855 [ERR] Failed to reload server configuration: config reload not supported for LeafNode: old={0.0.0.0 5223    [] 2 <nil> 2 false map[]  false 1s [] <nil> 0 0 <nil>}, new={0.0.0.0 5223    [] 2 <nil> 2 false map[]  false 1s [0xc000220140] <nil> 0 0 <nil>}

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with nats installed or the issue environment reproducible.
